      "それはパノラマ技術と関連があります。"

    ],

      "unknown"
    ],

      "それはH.コワルスキー作曲の交響曲があります。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは船の甲板にいるような錯覚という特徴があります。",
      "それは動くパノラマ絵画と大きなモーションプラットフォームの組み合わせという特徴があります。",
      "それはテーマと技術から得られるリアリズムという特徴があります。",
      "それはもっともらしい港への航路という特徴があります。",
      "それは光学的な錯覚という特徴があります。",
      "それは動きの機械的なシミュレーションという特徴があります。",
      "それは複数の形式の並置という特徴があります。",
      "それはそよ風、照明、音、匂いを含む感覚的要素という特徴があります。",
      "それはパノラマの感覚的指示の倍増という特徴があります。"
    ],
    "HeldIn": [
      "それは1900年パリ万国博覧会のアミューズメントセクションで開催されました。",
      "それはパリで開催されました。"
    ],

      "unknown"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "それは映画の発明に向けた技術的進歩に影響を与えました。"

      "それはパントマイム・ルミネーズの成功に影響を受けました。",

    ],

      "unknown"
    ],

    "IsA": [
      "それはエンターテイメントアトラクションです。",
      "それは動くパノラマ絵画と大きなモーションプラットフォームの組み合わせです。",
      "それはパノラマ技術における最後の主要な発展の一つと見なされています。",
      "それは時間と空間における感覚的な旅です。",
      "それはますます完璧な現実的な再現に向けた技術的な進歩です。"
    ],
    "KnownAs": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "KnownFor": [
      "それは1900年のパリ万国博覧会のエンターテイメントアトラクションとして知られています。",
      "それは動くパノラマ絵画と大きなモーションプラットフォームの組み合わせで知られています。",
      "それは海の旅の感情をシミュレートすることで知られています。",
      "それは技術と感覚的要素によって達成されたリアリズムで知られています。"
    ],

    "UsedFor": [
      "それはエンターテイメントに使用されます。",
      "それは船の甲板にいるような錯覚を作り出すために使用されます。",
      "それは海の旅の感情をシミュレートするために使用されます。",
      "それはもっともらしい港への航路を提供するために使用されます。",
      "それはあらゆる感覚に同時に訴えるために使用されます。",
      "それは可能な限り最も現実的な効果を得るために使用されます。"
    ],
    "UsedIn": [
      "それは1900年パリ万国博覧会のアミューズメントセクションで使用されました。"
    ],
    "UsedTo": [
      "それは船の甲板にいるような錯覚を作り出すために使用されます。",
      "それはプラットフォームにローリングとピッチングの動きを与えるために使用されます。",
      "それは海のそよ風を作り出すために使用されます。",
      "それは昼と夜の照明効果を作り出すために使用されます。",

    ],

About: It is about a simulated journey at sea.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the 1900 Paris Exposition.
It is associated with pantomimes lumineuses.
It is associated with moving images.
It is associated with the technology of panoramas.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the amusement section of the 1900 Paris Exposition.
BuiltIn: It was built in the amusement section of the 1900 Paris Exposition.
ConsistsOf: It consists of moving panoramic paintings and a large motion platform.
It consists of two panoramas on large rollers, one for the port side and one for the starboard.
It consists of a 33 m long replica of a steamship.
CreatedBy: It was created by Hugo d'Alesi.
CreatedFor: It was created for the 1900 Paris Exposition.
CreatedTo: It was created to provide the illusion of being on the deck of a ship.
DirectedBy: It was directed by Hugo d'Alesi.
HasA: It has a rolling and pitching motion.
It has lighting effects that created day- and night-time.
It has sound effects of the ship's screw and the steam siren.
It has an olfactory element provided by seaweed and tar.
It has actors portraying deck hands.
It has a symphony composed by H. Kowalski.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the illusion of being on the deck of a ship.
It is characterized by the combination of moving panoramic paintings and a large motion platform.
It is characterized by the realism derived from the theme and technology.
It is characterized by a simulated voyage itinerary.
It is characterized by the use of optical illusions.
It is characterized by the mechanical simulation of movement.
It is characterized by the juxtaposition of multiple forms.
It is characterized by sensory elements including breeze, lighting, sound, and smell.
It is characterized by the multiplication of the sensorial direction of the panorama.
HeldIn: It was held in the amusement section of the 1900 Paris Exposition.
Influenced: It influenced the technological march towards the invention of cinema.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the success of pantomimes lumineuses.
It was influenced by the success of moving images.
It was influenced by Thomas Edison's kinetoscope.
It was influenced by the Lumière brothers' films.
IsA: It is a combination of moving panoramic paintings and a large motion platform.
It is regarded as one of the last major developments in the technology of panoramas.
It is a sensory journey both in time and space.
It is a technological march towards an increasingly perfectly realistic reproduction.
KnownFor: It is known for being an entertainment attraction at the 1900 Paris Exposition.
It is known for its combination of moving panoramic paintings and a large motion platform.
It is known for simulating the emotion of traveling by sea.
It is known for its realism achieved through technology and sensory elements.
LocatedIn: It is located inside a building in the amusement section on the Champ de Mars.
It is located at the corner of Quai d'Alesi and avenue de Suffren.
OccurredAt: It occurred at the 1900 Paris Exposition.
PartOf: It is part of the amusement section of the 1900 Paris Exposition.
UsedAs: It is used as a simulated journey at sea.
UsedIn: It is used in the amusement section of the 1900 Paris Exposition.
UsedTo: It is used to create the illusion of being on the deck of a ship.
It is used to simulate the emotion of traveling by sea.
It is used to provide a plausible itinerary to several ports.
It is used to impact in all senses at once.
It is used to obtain the most realistic effect possible.
It is used to create the illusion of being on the deck of a ship.
It is used to give a rolling and pitching motion to the platform.
It is used to create an ocean breeze.
It is used to create day- and night-time lighting effects.
It is used to present a symphony.
